title: Medic Additions
description: Adds a whole bunch of medkits, bandages, and adrenaline shots to Minecraft! These items are used to heal you and give you buffs, like speed and strength. This mod also adds some fun items!!
body:
## ☕ Medic Additions (Version 1.3.0 – Cozy Consumables)

This is the biggest update yet for Medic Additions! Cozy up with a variety of warm drinks, sugary snacks, and a brand new utility block to spice up your survival experience. Whether you're roasting marshmallows over a campfire or grinding coffee in your new Grinder Block, there's something here for every cozy crafter.

### 🍫 New Consumables & Ingredients 
- **Espresso** – Provides a quick Speed boost.
- **Coffee** – A plain ol’ cup of joe.
- **Mocha** – Chocolatey coffee blend.
- **Hot Chocolate** – Warm, creamy, and nostalgic.
- **Can of Milk** – Used in mochas and removes negative effects.
- **Marshmello** – Not haunted. Used in several recipes.
- **Graham Cracker** – Essential for s’mores.
- **Chocolate Bar** – Eaten as-is or used in recipes.
- **Marshmello on a Stick** – Roast it over the fire!
- **Cooked Marshmello on a Stick** – Golden brown goodness.
- **Burnt Marshmello on a Stick** – For those with… crispier tastes.
- **Smore** – Cooked to perfection.
- **Burnt Smore** – For the adventurous palate.
- **Legendary Smore** – A rare, powerful, enchanted-like food item.
- **Ground Coffee** – Used in espresso and coffee.
- **Ground Chocolate** – Used in hot chocolate and chocolate bars.

### 🪴 New Plants 
**Coffee Beans**

➤ Can be planted on dirt to grow a Coffee Bush

➤ Naturally found in savanna and plains village house chests

➤ Harvest to grow your own bean supply

### ⚒️ New Blocks 

**Grinder Block**

➤ A brand new utility block that doubles grinding output

➤ Converts items like coffee beans, chocolate, and heartbloom into ground forms more efficiently

➤ Crafted using standard survival materials

### 🧱 New Crafting Materials 
- **Small Ceramic Mug** – Used in espresso recipes.
- **Ceramic Mug** – Used in coffee and hot chocolate.
- **Ceramic Bricks** – Used to craft mugs.

### 🛠️ General Changes & Fixes 
- 📏 Sugar Cube texture made smaller
- ⚙️ Added grinder recipes for:
- Ground Heartbloom
- Ground Chocolate
- Ground Coffee
- 🗂️ Renamed the creative tab from "Foods" → "Edibles"
- 🌟 New creative tab icon: the Smore item

### ⚠️ Developer Note 

This mod is made by a beginner coder! I’m learning as I go, so updates come out as quickly as I can make them. Not every feature will be huge, but I’m doing my best to make this mod worth downloading.

There are plans for a more polished version of this mod in the future, but for now, I’ll continue expanding this one. Some updates (like this one) will branch away from strictly medical content to include fun and cozy extras. Don’t worry—v1.4.0 is planned to return to more medicinal additions!

### 💬 Got feedback or bugs? 

Drop your ideas, suggestions, or bug reports in the comments — your input helps shape the future of this mod!
